{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220413161D83670674B80984486F"}"},"total":5487},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7282249773851001657","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我觉得算是上乘的末世文了，我基本末世都看过了，最讨厌开后宫到处杀人的套路了，这种主角三观正的文很不错的，剧情也不啰嗦，之前看有篇文，囤货写了80章太恶心了，这个末世有很多天灾，期待更多的天灾剧情下的表现"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1695531753,"group_id":"7264401303558687759","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5HMGwWYTUr//j9y6EPJGKfy+sRS9vlThrDhBi03l5jT","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"3781970710771437","user_name":"用户37819707"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3781970710771437","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7264401303558687759","book_info":{"abstract":"（末世+重生+空间+囤货+女强+宠物）
暴雨洪涝、极热、大雾、酸雨、极寒、地震、海啸……
天灾末世，挣扎求生四年的安南，遭渣爹遗弃、朋友背叛，含恨惨死。
再睁眼，重生回到了末世之前。她抢占先机，利用随身空间疯狂的囤积物资，美食、药品、武器……通通拿下！
这一世，别人为一块面包抢翻天，她在家一边撸狗一边享受牛排红酒。
渣男贱女？绿茶白莲？黑心邻居？谁敢惹她，通通干翻！
疯批女主，全程飒爽，不服就战！
（有cp，男主也很强。）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2fa2f2968fa48be4d75be1fd330ea75c","author":"锦城里","author_id":"","book_id":"7264401303558687759","book_name":"别人末世抢土豆，我在家里涮羊肉","book_short_name":"如果末日重来","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#383838","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":86,"name":"女强","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=86&name=女强&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":44,"name":"空间","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=44&name=空间&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":494,"name":"囤物资","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=494&name=囤物资&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":523,"name":"前世今生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=523&name=前世今生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":658,"name":"天灾","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=658&name=天灾&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7264487649581204008","read_count":"65776","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1771085"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.5","serial_count":"882","tags":"科幻末世,重生,空间,末世,女强,囤物资,前世今生,天灾","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/392b3e7d594e72e98972303aa588c4e5~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779307996&x-signature=zWR%2BDxjG90UCbxLoH0Z4yUSHPS4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"111113151041","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.00511e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220413161D83670674B80984486F"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":373,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":664,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":10714,"reply_count":41,"show_pv":380612},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7338365562458735422","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"绝了绝了，简直是我看过末日文里的白月光级别的存在啊！！！超喜欢安南！还有顾之屿喜欢死了！女主一点也不圣母，杀伐果断，有勇有谋，就喜欢这种大女主文，好多配角的人设也是超级棒的，那个小女佣和小游总真的好好磕哦，作者大大真的好牛！写的又有条理，又情节丰富，而且反转多多，语言幽默，紧跟当下的热梗，总之，千言万语汇成一句话：我超级喜欢！！！","text_exts":[{"e":19,"s":16,"text":"白月光","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%99%BD%E6%9C%88%E5%85%89&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741239960984486F%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227338365562458735422%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227264401303558687759%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%99%BD%E6%9C%88%E5%85%89%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1708598455,"group_id":"7264401303558687759","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1LN+OrpZjKmE/HMGUn6wE93AKGRDx0hhO4gFJDHSxdd","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/80e2c9760a8046a3957dc1e2d74c032a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776705336&x-signature=HjNYnKTiL%2FD1Sv9%2FJBA4y91tkqc%3D","user_id":"1673887117221037","user_name":"沈安颀"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1673887117221037","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7264401303558687759","book_info":{"abstract":"（末世+重生+空间+囤货+女强+宠物）
暴雨洪涝、极热、大雾、酸雨、极寒、地震、海啸……
天灾末世，挣扎求生四年的安南，遭渣爹遗弃、朋友背叛，含恨惨死。
再睁眼，重生回到了末世之前。她抢占先机，利用随身空间疯狂的囤积物资，美食、药品、武器……通通拿下！
这一世，别人为一块面包抢翻天，她在家一边撸狗一边享受牛排红酒。
渣男贱女？绿茶白莲？黑心邻居？谁敢惹她，通通干翻！
疯批女主，全程飒爽，不服就战！
